title: Fresh Illager Mod Compats
description: Adding Fresh Animation compatibility for Goety, Illager Invasion, Savage and Ravage, The Graveyard, etc.
body:
![Savage and Ravage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14da66da9345b224916f608c1d4fb11d46888d54.jpeg)

![Goety](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bae8cc6c28d93f3479192e846b682c29d79fde7.jpeg)

![How to Install](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/601f49409d77262e73d547759b233cff74728cd4.png)

Requirements:

-ETF & EMF Mod

  ETF: [https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

  EMF: [https://modrinth.com/mod/entitymodelfeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

-Fresh Animation (version 1.10 and above)

by FreshLX: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

-Place this resource pack above Fresh Animations in the resource pack list

**Note:** some of you asked, “Why did the Vindicator and Evoker animations change?” Okay, so many Illager mods use the same model as the Evoker and Vindicator, that’s why their animations had to change.
if you don't like it, you can turn back the original animations by download this addon:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1K65jCO29PxU14B0sHYvyIfFPj4qE-miH?usp=sharing

**Note for Goety players:** if you use this resource pack, some mobs will shake when you open The Black Book, to fix it just download this patch:

https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/1HF4ZcXM-1AJZ0TOS83JpTDLz06sf6cvV

![PATCH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa2ad341a9dad390ca68347d9cb998936017f1aa.png)

Also, to fix the Wither Skeleton Servant and Stray Servant animations (From Goety), the Vanilla Wither Skeleton and Stray animations need to be changed

Basher Helmet Addon:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Gh358ew4UtzEl1MihrIN5h_sT29QjI9u?usp=sharing

This resource pack is a compatibility add-on for Fresh Animations, designed to fix texture issues and give better animations for Illagers and other mobs from some mods below:

Supported Mods:

1. Savage and Ravage
2. Goety
3. Illager Invasion (with some addition)
4. The Graveyard (Illagers only)
5. Blue Skies (Illager Boss and Gatekeeper only)
6. Traders in Disguise
7. Supplementaries (Illager only)
8. Friends&Foes (Illager only)
9. Frostiful
10. Guard Illager
11. Biome Makeover (Cowboy Illager only)

*This pack is not affiliated with FreshLX, and meant to be used alongside their pack.

Join My Discord Server to Report Bugs:
https://discord.gg/gZKddSvCtT
